sesiones.title: Cash sessions
sesiones.description: Openings and closings by branch and shift: one open session per branch, only the opener can close it, and you cannot open another while yours is still open.
sesiones.search_placeholder: Search by notes or session ID…

empty.no_records_description: Open the first cash session when you start a shift at a branch.
empty.no_results_description: Try clearing filters or changing your search.

dialog_detalle.title: Reconciliation detail
dialog_detalle.description: Closed session summary: sales, payment methods and cash reconciliation.

dialog_imprimir.title: Print cash reconciliation
dialog_imprimir.description: Choose A4 for the full report, or a thermal ticket with the closing summary.
dialog_imprimir.hint_a4: Full report: methods, charts, sales detail and branding.
dialog_imprimir.hint_ticket: Short ticket: only the closing modal summary (no sales list).

sesiones.abrir_bloqueado_tooltip: Close your current session before opening another.

sin_sedes.title: No active branches
sin_sedes.description: Configure at least one active branch before opening cash sessions.

mi_sesion.title: Your open session
mi_sesion.description: You have an open cash session at {{sede}}. Close it at end of shift or before opening another at the same branch.

dialog_abrir.title: Open cash session
dialog_abrir.description: Select the branch and the opening cash float.

dialog_egreso.title: Record cash expense
dialog_egreso.description: Cash leaving the drawer for this session. It is subtracted from the closing reconciliation.
dialog_egreso.list_empty: No expenses in this session yet.

dialog_cerrar.title: Cash reconciliation & close
dialog_cerrar.description: Review sales, expenses, documents and payment methods. Match counted cash against expected cash.
dialog_cerrar.arqueo_error: Could not load reconciliation. You can still close with counted cash.
dialog_cerrar.ventas_empty: No paid sales in this session.
dialog_cerrar.clarify: {{count}} sales = {{total}} (products {{productos}} + services {{servicios}}). Cash to reconcile is {{esperado}}: opening + cash payments − expenses ({{egresos}}). Other methods ({{otros}}) do not go into the drawer.

ventas.title: Sales
ventas.description: Sales recorded at the register: totals, customer and electronic receipt status (SUNAT).

empty.no_records_description: Record the first sale from “New sale” with your cash session open.
empty.no_results_description: Try clearing the search or changing the status filter.

whatsapp.title: Send receipt via WhatsApp
whatsapp.description_with_phone: The PDF ticket for {{numero}} will be sent to {{cliente}} ({{telefono}}).
whatsapp.description_no_phone: {{cliente}} has no phone on file. Enter the WhatsApp number to send the ticket.
whatsapp.phone_hint: Peruvian mobile (9 digits) or with country code.
whatsapp.ancho_hint: Choose the thermal roll width. The PDF will be sent in that format.
whatsapp.ancho_cpe_hint: If a SUNAT CPE is issued, that PDF is sent. Width applies to the internal cash ticket.

show.title: Sale {{numero}}
show.description: Products sold, totals and payment details.
show.lineas_vacio: This sale has no line items.
show.pu_sin_igv_hint: Unit prices and line subtotals are the taxable base (excl. VAT) as recorded at sale time.
show.imprimir_ticket_ayuda: Opens here; pick 56, 58 or 80 mm in the dialog, then Print.
show.ticket_modal_description: Preview of the payment receipt. You can close or send to print.
show.cpe_modal_description: Preview of the SUNAT receipt. You can close or send to print.
show.consulta_vinculo_body: This sale comes from the pre-invoice for {{paciente}}.
show.fel_previsto_elegido_caja: Type selected when the sale was registered at checkout.
show.fel_sin_apisunat: Configure APISUNAT under Settings › General to issue receipts.
show.ticket_espera_cpe: Print the receipt after issuing the SUNAT voucher.
show.anular_venta_desc: Reverses product stock, releases pre-invoice/grooming/hotel links, and voids the SUNAT receipt if already issued.
show.anular_venta_desc_ticket: Reverses product stock and releases any linked pre-invoice, grooming, or hotel stay.
show.anular_venta_desc_sunat: Reverses product stock, releases pre-invoice/grooming/hotel links, and voids the SUNAT receipt if already issued.
show.ticket_interno_hint: Recorded as a cash-register ticket only. Not linked to SUNAT.
show.anular_motivo_ph: E.g. billing error, customer cancelled, duplicate…

desde_cargo.banner_body: Lines loaded from {{paciente}}'s visit ({{fecha}}). Pre-invoice total: {{total}}.
desde_cargo.cliente_bloqueado: Customer and patient come from the confirmed pre-invoice.

create.title: New sale
create.description: Add products or services, pick the customer and payment method. Stock applies only to inventory products.
create.sin_sesion_body: Open your shift under Cash › Sessions before recording sales.
create.hint_fel: With your current settings, saving the sale will issue the electronic receipt via Lucode (APISUNAT).
create.card_cliente_desc: Owner to bill and linked patient, if any.
create.comprobante_ticket_hint: Internal printer receipt only. Not sent to SUNAT.
create.comprobante_hint: Electronic boleta or invoice. Customer ID is sent to SUNAT.
create.ticket_solo_hint: Your plan does not include SUNAT electronic vouchers. Checkout generates an internal ticket for printing only.
create.card_productos_desc: Search by name, SKU or barcode and add to the cart.
create.buscar_producto_ph: Type at least 2 characters (name, SKU or barcode)
create.card_servicios_desc: Consultations, procedures or other non-inventory items. Search configured rates or enter one manually.
create.sin_tarifas_servicio: No matching rates. You can add the service manually below.
create.carrito_vacio_hint_servicios: Search products or add a service to start the sale.
create.card_carrito_desc: Review quantities, service unit prices, and line totals before checkout.
create.carrito_vacio_hint: Search for products or add services in the panels above.
create.hint_precio_incluye_igv: The product sale price is the final amount charged to the customer. Each cart line shows that total; below, taxable base and VAT ({{pct}}%) are split for receipts. Change this in Settings → General.
create.hint_precio_sin_igv: The product sale price excludes VAT: {{pct}}% is added at checkout. If your prices are already final, enable «Entered prices include VAT» under Settings → General.
create.card_pago_desc: Payment method, totals and sale confirmation.
create.error_guardar_generico: Check the form and try again. Contact an administrator if the issue persists.
create.stock_cero: Out of stock at this branch
create.sin_stock_body: «{{producto}}» has no stock at your cash session branch.
create.rapido_producto_desc: Create the product and its initial stock at your session branch to sell it right away.
create.rapido_servicio_desc: Save the service to the catalog to reuse it and add it to this sale.
create.rapido_stock_hint: Stock will be registered at the «{{sede}}» branch of your cash session.
create.rapido_producto_ok: «{{producto}}» registered and added to the cart.
create.rapido_servicio_ok: «{{servicio}}» registered and added to the cart.
create.rapido_error: Could not register. Check the data and try again.
create.rapido_sin_sesion: Open your cash session before registering a product with stock.
